items.title: AI pre-validation design for .psa import errors
items.notes: Brainstorming AI-assisted pre-import validation. Error types identified: Duplicate UPC, Invalid Store Number (blank/null/non-numeric), Invalid UPC Format (duplicate product / null / non-numeric chars), Product not in CBI Master (WIP warning), Unable to create store assignment. Left off at clarifying question: which bucket matters more — auto-fixing deterministic errors (no AI needed) vs intelligently resolving ambiguous ones (duplicate UPC resolution, unknown product matching). AI library candidates: Microsoft.ML or LLamaSharp. Next step: get user answer, then propose 2-3 approaches.

items.title: Get CKB schema for PogValidator — stores and products tables
items.notes: PogValidator Phase 1 needs real table/column names. Run in SSMS against cx-lpt943\v2022, db ckb: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%store%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%product%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%spc%'; then sp_help on the store and product tables. Update CommonConstants.cs with results.

items.title: Set up Snowflake MCP connection for Space Planning Upload v2.1 schema inspection
items.notes: Need snowflake-connector-python + a Python MCP server (not mssql_mcp_server - different engine). Goal: inspect target table schemas for Crisp Platform delivery design. CKB MCP already wired up (cx-lpt943\v2022, db: ckb, Windows auth).

items.title: File-free export — write implementation plan
items.notes: Design complete and spec approved. Next: invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan. Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-30-file-free-export-design.md. Key design: cx_stg_export_job staging table (shared Pog/Floor), SP name constant in CommandFactory.cs, app.config for runtime settings, --job guid arg for DM flow, no-arg for PS flow. HTML READMEs written for both PogExport and FlrExport.

items.title: Redesign Snowflake sync to pull from CKB by status
items.notes: Import manages planogram lifecycle (banner/year/period). Snowflake sync is decoupled - delta sync every 60s keyed on DBKEY. Strategy: compare CKB ix_spc_planogram (PgStatus IN configured values) vs Snowflake IX_SPC_PLANOGRAM - INSERT planograms (+ child rows) in CKB not in Snowflake, DELETE planograms (+ orphaned child rows) in Snowflake not in CKB. No truncate+reload. No BatchGUID. Child tables cascade off planogram DBKEY. After each sync cycle completes, mark all pending SnowflakeSynced import records as done. Current broken design re-parses raw PSA via BYDataConverter giving fake DBKEYs 0/1/2 per file.
